title: boot_integrity_agent
description: A boot-time agent that pulls the signed commit history from the global‑immortality branch, verifies cryptographic linkage, and cross‑checks a pre‑computed state hash to ensure the repository is the single source of truth. If verification succeeds it loads runtime modules; otherwise it rolls back to the last valid tag.

title: deterministic_rebase
description: Script that automatically rebases incoming commits onto the latest tag, rejecting non-fast-forward changes and logging the rebase path. It provides an API for CI tests and ensures deterministic rebasing for the global immortality axiom.
